leadText: Grim Neigh (Japanese: くろのいななき Black Neigh) is an Ability introduced during Generation VIII, in The Crown Tundra. It is the signature Ability of Spectrier.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Grim Neigh directly causes another Pokémon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Special Attack is increased by one stage. If its Special Attack is already at +6 stages, Grim Neigh will not activate. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Grim Neigh has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Grim Neigh directly causes another Pokémon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Special Attack is increased by one stage. If its Special Attack is already at +6 stages, Grim Neigh will not activate.
